qa_pair.question: Scaffold a hero block and verify it produces exactly 5 files: hero.js, hero.css, README.md, test.html, and sample-content.md
qa_pair.answer: The scaffold_block tool returns 5 files: blocks/hero/hero.js (with export default function decorate), blocks/hero/hero.css (scoped to .hero), blocks/hero/README.md, blocks/hero/test.html, and blocks/hero/sample-content.md

qa_pair.question: Validate this block JS and confirm it catches the localStorage violation: export default function decorate(block) { localStorage.setItem('key', 'val'); }
qa_pair.answer: The validate_block tool returns an error: "localStorage/sessionStorage are forbidden in EDS blocks — content is server-rendered" with a fix suggesting CSS classes, data attributes, or URL parameters instead

qa_pair.question: Validate CSS that uses .cards-container as a custom class and confirm the tool flags it as an error, not just a warning
qa_pair.params: {"blockName": "cards", "js": "export default function decorate(block) {}", "css": ".cards { display: grid; }\n.cards-container { max-width: 1200px; }"}
qa_pair.answer: The validate_block tool returns an ERROR (not warning) for ".cards-container" explaining it is auto-generated by EDS on the parent section div, and defining it in block CSS applies styles to the wrong element. Fix suggests using .cards-inner or .cards-panel instead

qa_pair.question: Use explain_dom with blockName "tabs" and variant "dark, wide" and verify the DOM shows both variant classes
qa_pair.answer: The explain_dom tool returns DOM with class="tabs dark wide" on the block element (both variants applied as separate CSS classes), wrapped in div class="tabs-wrapper"

qa_pair.question: Generate a scaffold_model for a "testimonial" block with fields: quote (richtext), author (text-input), image (reference), imageAlt (text-input). Verify the tool detects field collapse for image+imageAlt
qa_pair.answer: The scaffold_model tool returns JSON for component-models.json, component-definitions.json, and component-filters.json. It detects field collapse: "image + imageAlt → will collapse into picture img src alt" pattern

qa_pair.question: Get the eds_config for configType "all" and verify it includes at least fstab, head-html, redirects, headers, robots sections
qa_pair.answer: The eds_config tool returns a complete configuration guide containing sections for fstab.yaml, head.html, redirects.xlsx, headers.xlsx, robots.txt, sitemap/SEO, helix config, and repoless architecture. The domain "example.com" appears in the robots.txt sitemap URL

qa_pair.question: Check performance of a block with 15KB of JS code that uses fetch() and is above the fold. Verify it flags both size and fetch as issues
qa_pair.params: {"blockName": "data-display", "js": "export default async function decorate(block) { const resp = await fetch('/api/data'); const data = await resp.json(); block.innerHTML = data.html; } // padding to simulate size...", "isAboveFold": true}
qa_pair.answer: The check_performance tool returns findings including: a CRITICAL finding for "Network request in decorate() blocks rendering" (because isAboveFold is true), and a warning about innerHTML with fetch being an XSS risk. The budget line shows the block counts against the 100KB pre-LCP budget

qa_pair.question: Use lookup_block to search for "accordion" and verify it returns a matching built-in pattern with fields and implementation hints
qa_pair.answer: The lookup_block tool returns the accordion pattern with: description mentioning expandable/collapsible sections, fields (heading text-input, content richtext), CSS hint about details/summary for a11y, JS hint about converting rows to details/summary elements. Also includes external library links and programmatic search scripts

qa_pair.question: Get the eds_scripts_guide for topic "load-delayed" and verify it includes Google Analytics and Adobe Analytics examples
qa_pair.answer: The eds_scripts_guide returns delayed.js guidance with code examples for loadGoogleAnalytics() (using googletagmanager.com/gtag/js), loadAdobeAnalytics() (using assets.adobedtm.com), and loadChatWidget(). Includes the rule: "NEVER put analytics in scripts.js or block JS"

qa_pair.question: Validate a block JS that uses document.querySelector('.hero') inside decorate() and verify it catches this as a multi-instance safety violation
qa_pair.params: {"blockName": "hero", "js": "export default function decorate(block) { const el = document.querySelector('.hero'); el.classList.add('loaded'); }"}
qa_pair.answer: The validate_block tool returns errors including: "document.querySelector('.hero') breaks when multiple block instances exist on the same page — use block.querySelector() instead" with a fix suggesting to use block.querySelector() or the block parameter directly
